about_item: Collapsible Design: The travel dog bowls can collapse completely flat, easy to storage, clip onto backpack, belt loop, dog leash, put them in your car or vehicle
Very Durable and Safe: The portable dog bowl are made of 100% Premium silicone at Food Grade, BPA Free and non-toxic
Portable and Convenient: The collapsible dog water bowl are foldable, lightweight and compact, it's very handy when you are on a road trip, travel, dog park, hiking, camping, picnic, etc
Size: 6.4*4.1*2.4 inch (Expanded), 0.5 inch height (Folded), each one portable dog water bowl holds up to 2.5 Cups (20 fl oz) water or food, suitable for small to medium dogs, cats, doggy, puppy
Easy to Clean: These silicone dog bowl are dishwasher safe, put the collapse dog bowl in the top rack or wash the them by rinsing or wiping it

summary.text: Customers find these collapsible pet bowls excellent for travel, being easy to store in cars and clip to bags. The bowls are durable, with one customer noting they hold up to boiling water heat, and offer good value for money. Customers appreciate their functionality, with one mentioning they work well for picnics, and their collapsibility, with one noting they collapse down tightly. The size receives mixed feedback - while some find them large enough for large dogs, others say they're not suitable for big dogs.

insights.title: Portability
insights.summary: Customers find the pet bowls highly portable, noting they are great for traveling with pets and easy to store in the car, with one customer mentioning they can be put in their dog's backpack.

examples.snippet: This set of colorful collapsible bowls, great for travel and for smalll dogs. Very happy with this product....
Great for traveling! I'm able to attach to the backpack for hiking, to my pup's car seat when traveling and on my key clip when out for a walk....
...Since attaching these is what makes them portable, I give it two stars. I will have to purchase more caribiners to continue to use this product.
As my header stated these are perfect for traveling (car, plane, hikes, etc.) or for a pet emergency bag. I liked that you get 4! Great value.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find these pet bowls to be of good quality, particularly noting their suitability for both water and food.

examples.snippet: Great product. Have them hanging off my fanny packs, backpacks and in vehicles for easy water for dogs. They are durable and come with caribiners.
These are great! A must have for traveling! Good quality. Exactly as described. I love that these come with clips....
Great bowls, we travel in a RV and they work so great. The carabiner hook nicely to a ring we have in the RV.
Love that this seller offers a 4 pack since I have 2 dogs. Great quality and value. I use them all the time and the clips are very handy! Very happy!

insights.title: Durability

Used these on a long road trip and they were great! Fold down easily, durable and easy to wash. Might be slightly heavy for hiking?...
Very flimsy. Would much prefer a stiffer option, b/c picking it up when full of water is almost impossible. Do nor recommend.
...Very durable. 3month American Bulldog has not chewed through it yet.

insights.title: Value for money

examples.snippet: ...Then it folds back down and stores away easy. Really great price for this product!! Easy to wash and it comes with clips to hook to any bag or leash.
I love them! They are just what I was hoping for and more! Great value, perfect size, lightweight for travel, cute design on the bottom, and...

examples.snippet: ...Hook them together so easy to store, bright colors easy to find, collapsible! I can make the sides high or low depending on the contents and the pet....

We've used the bowls a few times now-they work great! Hook right on to the back pack we use when walking the dog. Would definitely recommend!

insights.title: Functionality
insights.summary: Customers find that the pet bowls work well, particularly for small dogs like Chihuahuas, and one customer mentions they are perfect for cross-country road trips.

examples.snippet: ...Got them for my dog to use when we go out for walks and they work great. Very durable. Love how they expand and collapse for storage.
Only wish there was clips on all the bowls Works great My dog need a bowl to drink out of German Shepard
Fun and functional. Keep one of these inside your pet carrier.,you'll always be able to give your pet water. You have a portable bowl.
...They work well, collapsing how they should. I love that they come with matching clips. I'd recommend.

insights.title: Size

examples.snippet: ...The small carabiners are a great addition. They are small, collapsible, lightweight and easy to pack. I look forward to long usage.
They say they are large but too small for a 4 month old large breed puppy.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect bowls for on-the-go!
authors_reviews.text: I really like these collapsible bowls. They are lightweight, easy to carry, and open up to a good size for my pet. The silicone material feels durable and they clean very easily. The clip is great for attaching to a bag when traveling. Very practical and worth the price.
authors_reviews.author: Kemberly A

authors_reviews.title: Exactly what I wanted
authors_reviews.text: Very sturdy material, holds water well, folds up and down easily, easy to clean, great color selection. We use it for water for our outside cats in the winter so we can just pop the ice out and it works perfectly.
authors_reviews.author: Chris

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for Smaller Dogs
authors_reviews.text: Let's face it -- you want to bring poochie everywhere with you, but you don't want to be lugging her big water bowl around and you aren't keen on letting her drink out of your bottle. Problem solved with the PetBonus Silicone Collapsible Dog Bowl. This four-pack of brightly colored silicone bowls is perfect for pets on the go. If you want to fill it with water, it holds 12 ounces comfortably. It also can be used for food (obviously), although the bowl will move when the dog eats out of it. That being said, the silicone is a good thickness (no worries about cracks or punctures) and the rims have a good rigidity to keep shape.The packability of the bowls is superb. The fold very flat and I can actually fit one into the side pocket of my cargo/hiking shorts. But they conveniently come with a carabiner, which is even better. I just clip this sucker onto my daypack and poochie and I are ready to go. I also put one in the glove compartment of both cars for those "just in case" moments. Seriously, for this price and quality, it's a no-brainer.
authors_reviews.author: Mike

authors_reviews.title: Nice quality and convenient
authors_reviews.text: These are nice and sturdy, easily clipped to my bag or put in my dog's backpack. She doesn't mind either if I clip it to her regular harness. My only complaint is that it doesn't always stay flattened once I smush it back down. Kind of annoying for it to pop open when it's dangling from her harness. Size is fine for a drink when we hike.
authors_reviews.author: SusanSays

authors_reviews.title: Convenient on road trips.
authors_reviews.text: Good value for the money. Good quality, substantial.
authors_reviews.author: MAK

authors_reviews.title: Great bowls
authors_reviews.text: Great travel bowls. Easy to take with you
authors_reviews.author: Brian H.

authors_reviews.title: Great and durable
authors_reviews.text: Used these for a 3 week road trip with my dog and they held up perfectly. Light weight for hiking, compact for packing, but durable for use. Perfect size for my German Shepherd.
authors_reviews.author: Shannon

authors_reviews.title: Great travel bowls
authors_reviews.text: We use these when we go to the beach and travel with our pup. They are great quality, I love that they fold flat and have a clip. I can fold it up and clip it to the side of his bag. They are perfect size to hold enough but not to big to get in the way.
authors_reviews.author: Jordan Marshall

other_countries_reviews.text: Pratique pour le voyage, résistant et bonne capacité
other_countries_reviews.author: dominique PERRIN

other_countries_reviews.title: Very nice soft bowls
other_countries_reviews.text: I bought the black bowls. They have no plastic ring around the top. I like that of course plastic brakes faster and it is not practical for our cold winters. The bowl unfolds nicely and folds back fast and easy. Each bowl features a carabiner. One for each Golden Retriever. I am very happy with the purchase and the quality.
other_countries_reviews.author: Rascal

other_countries_reviews.title: Easy and convenient
other_countries_reviews.text: Perfect size for my toy poodle. Easy to attach to the lead to have ready when needed.
other_countries_reviews.author: Patti Bee

other_countries_reviews.title: Great for travelling with your dog.
other_countries_reviews.text: Perfect size for our 15lb dog. Excellent when travelling. They are collapsable and easy to store. Cleaning them is easy as can be. I recommend this product ti all animal owners.
other_countries_reviews.author: Peter

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfect
other_countries_reviews.text: Great product, easy to fold and clean, it feels like rubber, my chihuahuas ear and drink from these on the road, and didn't take them long to get used to them
other_countries_reviews.author: Angela Beckett
